metadata.description: Structured AI workflows for design — 90 skills and 34 commands across 12 plugins, from research and strategy to brand identity, motion, accessibility, and delivery.

plugins.name: design-research
plugins.description: User research skills for designers: personas, empathy maps, journey maps, interview scripts, usability testing, and card sorting.

plugins.name: design-systems
plugins.description: Design system skills: component specs, design tokens, naming conventions, spacing and grid systems, accessibility standards, and documentation.

plugins.name: ux-strategy
plugins.description: UX strategy skills: competitive analysis, market positioning, design principles, experience mapping, and strategic alignment.

plugins.name: ui-design
plugins.description: UI design skills: color palettes, typography systems, layout grids, responsive breakpoints, dark mode specs, visual hierarchy, and brand alignment.

plugins.name: interaction-design
plugins.description: Interaction design skills: micro-interactions, animation principles, state machines, gesture patterns, error handling UX, and feedback patterns.

plugins.name: prototyping-testing
plugins.description: Prototyping and testing skills: wireframe specs, usability heuristics, heuristic evaluations, accessibility audits, A/B test design, and benchmark analysis.

plugins.name: design-ops
plugins.description: Design operations skills: handoff specs, critique facilitation, sprint planning, client feedback management, and revision workflows.

plugins.name: designer-toolkit
plugins.description: Designer utilities: design rationale, presentations, pitch decks, case studies, UX writing, and system adoption.

plugins.name: brand-identity
plugins.description: Brand identity skills: brand strategy, visual identity systems, logo systems, brand guidelines, brand voice, color identity, and typographic identity.

plugins.name: client-pitch
plugins.description: Client and pitch skills: proposal writing, project scoping, client briefing, kickoff facilitation, pitch structure, and feedback management.

plugins.name: motion-design
plugins.description: Motion design skills: motion principles, scroll animation, transition systems, hero animations, brand motion language, and loading patterns.

plugins.name: accessibility
plugins.description: Accessibility skills: WCAG 2.2 compliance, color contrast, screen reader UX, keyboard navigation, ARIA patterns, and German BFSG compliance.
